_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: flarelaxtechnologies@gmail.com
author: vanshu@flarelax.com
description: Flarelax Free Host Egg - 100% Auto-Install PaperMC with Shutdown Plugin

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y curl
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

cat > install.sh << 'INSTALLEOF'
#!/bin/bash

display() {
    echo -e "\033c"
    echo "
    ==========================================================================

 Flarelax Free Host

    =========================================================================="
}

forceStuffs() {
    mkdir -p plugins/noMemberShutdown
    cd plugins && curl -s -O https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DgUoVPBP/versions/QucVTrXS/IdleServerShutdown-1.3.jar && cd ..
    cd plugins/noMemberShutdown && curl -s -O https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AvexXS/SovietEgg/main/config.yml && cd ../..
    echo "eula=true" > eula.txt
}

installJq() {
    if [ ! -x "tmp/jq" ]; then
        mkdir -p tmp
        curl -s -o tmp/jq -L https://github.com/jqlang/jq/releases/download/jq-1.7.1/jq-linux-amd64
        chmod +x tmp/jq
    fi
}

launchJavaServer() {
    # Failsafe for SERVER_MEMORY if it's missing or too low
    if [ -z "$SERVER_MEMORY" ] || [ "$SERVER_MEMORY" -le 256 ]; then
        memory=1024
    else
        memory=$((SERVER_MEMORY - 200))
    fi
    
    java -Xms128M -Xmx${memory}M -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:G1NewSizePercent=30 -XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent=40 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=8M -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -XX:G1HeapWastePercent=5 -XX:G1MixedGCCountTarget=4 -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent=15 -XX:G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent=90 -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent=5 -XX:SurvivorRatio=32 -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:MaxTenuringThreshold=1 -Dusing.aikars.flags=https://mcflags.emc.gs -Daikars.new.flags=true -jar server.jar nogui
}

optimizeJavaServer() {
    echo "view-distance=6" >> server.properties
}

# 100% Corrupt server.jar Protection
if [ -e "server.jar" ]; then
    SIZE=$(wc -c < "server.jar" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    if [ "$SIZE" -lt 1000000 ]; then
        echo "Corrupt server.jar detected (${SIZE} bytes). Auto-removing..."
        rm -f server.jar
    fi
fi

if [ ! -e "server.jar" ]; then
    display
    echo "Downloading PaperMC ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}..."
    sleep 2
    forceStuffs
    installJq

    # Try fetching PaperMC API
    API_RESPONSE=$(curl -s https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper)
    LATEST_VERSION=$(echo "$API_RESPONSE" | ./tmp/jq -r '.versions[-1]' 2>/dev/null)
    
    if [ -n "$LATEST_VERSION" ] && [ "$LATEST_VERSION" != "null" ]; then
        VER_EXISTS=$(echo "$API_RESPONSE" | ./tmp/jq -r --arg V "$MINECRAFT_VERSION" '.versions[] | select(. == $V)' 2>/dev/null)
        if [ -z "$VER_EXISTS" ] || [ "$MINECRAFT_VERSION" = "latest" ] || [ -z "$MINECRAFT_VERSION" ]; then
            MINECRAFT_VERSION=$LATEST_VERSION
        fi
        echo "Using PaperMC version: $MINECRAFT_VERSION"
        BUILD_NUMBER=$(curl -s "https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${MINECRAFT_VERSION}" | ./tmp/jq -r '.builds[-1]' 2>/dev/null)
        DOWNLOAD_URL="https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${MINECRAFT_VERSION}/builds/${BUILD_NUMBER}/downloads/paper-${MINECRAFT_VERSION}-${BUILD_NUMBER}.jar"
    else
        echo "[WARNING] PaperMC API is rate-limiting this host's IP."
        echo "[INFO] Switching to PurpurMC (100% Paper compatible, faster drop-in replacement)..."
        API_RESPONSE=$(curl -s https://api.purpurmc.org/v2/purpur)
        LATEST_VERSION=$(echo "$API_RESPONSE" | ./tmp/jq -r '.versions[-1]' 2>/dev/null)
        if [ "$MINECRAFT_VERSION" = "latest" ] || [ -z "$MINECRAFT_VERSION" ]; then
            MINECRAFT_VERSION=$LATEST_VERSION
        fi
        echo "Using PurpurMC version: $MINECRAFT_VERSION"
        BUILD_NUMBER=$(curl -s "https://api.purpurmc.org/v2/purpur/${MINECRAFT_VERSION}" | ./tmp/jq -r '.builds.latest' 2>/dev/null)
        DOWNLOAD_URL="https://api.purpurmc.org/v2/purpur/${MINECRAFT_VERSION}/${BUILD_NUMBER}/download"
    fi

    echo "Downloading from: $DOWNLOAD_URL"
    curl --progress-bar -o server.jar "$DOWNLOAD_URL"
    
    # Verify downloaded file size one more time before launch
    FINAL_SIZE=$(wc -c < "server.jar" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    if [ "$FINAL_SIZE" -lt 1000000 ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Download failed again! File is too small (${FINAL_SIZE} bytes)."
        rm -f server.jar
        exit 1
    fi

    display
    optimizeJavaServer
    launchJavaServer
else
    display
    forceStuffs
    launchJavaServer
fi
INSTALLEOF

chmod +x install.sh
echo "install.sh successfully embedded and ready!"

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The version of minecraft to download. Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.
